1: His name is is great in Israel.
2: And his dwelling place in Zion.
3: The shield, and the sword, and the battle. Selah. Selah.
5: And none of the men of might have found their hands.
6: Both the chariot and horse are cast into a dead sleep.
7: And who may stand in thy sight when once thou art angry?
8: The earth feared, and was still,
9: To save all the meek of the earth. Selah. Selah.
10: The remainder of wrath shalt thou restrain.
11: Bring presents unto him that ought to be feared.
12: He is He is terrible to the kings of the earth.
